OPENAI_API_KEY.description: OpenAI API key — used server-side as a default for the AI Helper. Users can override with their own key in the UI.

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key — used server-side as a default for the AI Helper.

DEEPSEEK_API_KEY.description: DeepSeek API key — used server-side as a default for the AI Helper.
